fieldValues.fieldValue: =Welcome to MediFlow, {{ $('Validate Fields').item.json.full_name }}! Your profile has been created. Log in to book your appointment.

parameters.content:
## MediFlow Patient Registration

### This workflow handles the patients registration page
**Double click** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

## MediFlow Patient Login

### This workflow handles the patients Login page
**Double click** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

## MediFlow Appointment Booking

### This workflow handles the patients Appointment booking page
**Double click** to edit me. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ 'Hello ' + $('Get Patient Details').item.json.full_name + '! Your appointment with Dr. Adaeze Eze is confirmed for ' + new Date($('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_date + 'T' + $('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_time + '+01:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {weekday:'long', day:'numeric', month:'long', year:'numeric', timeZone:'Africa/Lagos'}) + ' at ' + new Date($('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_date + 'T' + $('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_time + '+01:00').toLocaleTimeString('en-GB', {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', timeZone:'Africa/Lagos'}) + '. Please arrive 5 minutes early.' }}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "message": "Appointment confirmed",
  "appointment_id": "{{ $('Book Appointment').item.json.data }}",
  "slot_date": "{{ $('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_date }}",
  "slot_time": "{{ $('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_time }}",
  "doctor": "{{ $('Get Slot Details').item.json.doctor_name }}",
  "urgent_flag": "{{ $('Validate Booking').item.json.urgent_flag }}"
}

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ 'Hello! Your consultation with ' + $('Validate Input').item.json.doctor_name + ' is complete. Diagnosis: ' + $('Validate Input').item.json.diagnosis + '. Prescription: ' + $('Validate Input').item.json.prescription + '. Please follow your treatment plan and book a follow-up if needed.' }}

parameters.subject: Mediflow Booking Details
parameters.message: =={{ 'Hello ' + $('Get Patient Details').item.json.full_name + '! Your appointment with Dr. Adaeze Eze is confirmed for ' + new Date($('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_date + 'T' + $('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_time + '+01:00').toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {weekday:'long', day:'numeric', month:'long', year:'numeric', timeZone:'Africa/Lagos'}) + ' at ' + new Date($('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_date + 'T' + $('Get Slot Details').item.json.slot_time + '+01:00').toLocaleTimeString('en-GB', {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', timeZone:'Africa/Lagos'}) + '. Please arrive 5 minutes early.' }}
